decision: Use file-based context storage before DB adoption.
details: Persist branch organization, active slots, teams, and sequential restart plan under data/.

decision: Keep active branch agent count at maximum six.
details: Current six active roles are Chief Min, Han Ops, Caden Android, Seo Security, Mira Ledger, and Joon MSA. Replace sessions sequentially only after clean handoff.

decision: Report boot receipt and Android inspect-only readiness to Branch Director.
details: Boot context and Android ASCII report read. Caden Android is in inspect-only mode before explicit 14:00 start. Residual issue is intermittent two-tap requirement on name field after re-entering joint certificate page. Next debug question: first tap missing DOM focusin vs DOM focus present while Android IME/InputConnection drops to inputType=0. No code edits performed.

decision: Request LCC CORE product work to expose Codex /status quota data in the operator surface.
details: User wants the quota/status information visible in Codex /status, including model/session/account/context window and 5h/weekly quota remaining, to be visible from LCC CORE. Request routed to Chief Min/development team via work-ledger task lcc-core-codex-status-quota. Constraints: no token exposure, prefer structured status source or safe parser, security review by Seo Security before release.

decision: Add leader/team-lead status check criteria and promote 14:00 KST Spring MSA study start to top schedule priority.
details: Per Chief Min order, each team lead must inspect subordinate session preview/log directly before reporting. Command-no-response, composer wait, plan wait, or Enter wait is abnormal and must be recorded with owner/next action. Product code edits prohibited; ledger/report only.

decision: Add P0 TerminalCard footer chat input issue and keep earlier newline/submit checks scoped as terminal internal/modal partial PASS only.
details: New unresolved P0: TerminalCard bottom chat input cannot attach images and newline/submit is unstable. Owner Dev Alpha; subowners Dev Bravo, Dev Charlie, Dev Delta, Dev Echo, Dev Foxtrot. 14:00 KST Spring MSA study remains top schedule priority.

decision: PTY-visible terminal output is the source of truth for operational reporting.
details: Files, markdown, and ledger are secondary audit artifacts. Team-lead reports must first appear in the reporter's pty with ACK/HEARTBEAT/REPORT prefix. ACK is due in 30 seconds, REPORT on done/block, HEARTBEAT every 3 minutes. Dev Alpha terminal-log-only report is recorded as a communication gap until routed to Chief Min/HQ visible pty report. Leadership-facing body text must use highest Korean honorifics.

decision: Add P0 UI Overlay occlusion item per Branch Director request.
details: Local disconnect/status overlay occludes Grid/Canvas controls; ledger floating badge occludes terminal/card footer. Owner Dev Alpha. Acceptance: overlays removed/repositioned or made draggable/dockable; no occlusion of primary controls/input/footer; position persistence if feasible.

decision: Record enterprise newline/submit audit due 2026-05-31 14:10 KST.
details: All staff must print ACK newline-audit <role> in pty, then REPORT newline-audit status=<ok|affected|fixed|blocked> evidence=<exact terminal/session/file/test>. Scope includes bottom chat input, terminal internal composer, fullscreen/modal composer, Shift+Enter newline, Enter submit, IME composing Enter, image attach/delivery path, command no-response, plan wait, and Enter wait. Dev Alpha leads permanent patch plan and approval/emergency decision report.

decision: Track product-code-change-before-approval as a separate risk.
details: Before approved product-code work begins, leads must separately inspect and record whether product code changed without approval. Mira Ledger updated only ledger/report artifacts for this order.

Task state flow is fixed as assigned -> acknowledged -> doing -> heartbeat* -> reported -> completed|blocked|stopped. PTY-visible ACK/HEARTBEAT/REPORT remains source of truth. Work Ledger event kind is now controlled vocabulary; unknown event kinds must be rejected by API after next 9002 maintenance restart. Policy document: docs/agent-state-management-policy-20260531.md.

decision: Create SpringMSA TF in the left Sessions rail without increasing active session count.
details: SpringMSA TF membership: Branch Director as TF lead, Joon MSA as MSA owner, and Chief Min, Han Ops, Seo Security, Mira Ledger as four assistant researchers. Caden Android remains outside the TF for Android workstream continuity. UI filter groups active TF sessions and marks Branch Director as off-console until a live branch-director session is attached.

decision: Split SpringMSA into a two-person TF and an on-demand research pool; add Development Team group.
details: Per Lucas direction, Chief Min belongs to all context-bearing groups. SpringMSA TF is Chief Min plus Joon MSA. SpringMSA Research is four inactive/on-demand researchers. Development Team is Chief Min, Dev Alpha as development lead, and Dev Bravo/Charlie/Delta/Echo as four implementers. Left rail groups are display/filter groups and do not increase active sessions by themselves.

decision: Collapse SpringMSA TF and research into one active SpringMSA TF and spawn Development Team sessions.
details: SpringMSA TF is Chief Min, Joon MSA, and four active Spring MSA researchers.
Development Team is Chief Min, Dev Lead, and Developer 1-4.
Nine new sessions were spawned through 9002: spring-msa-research-1..4, dev-lead, developer-1..4.
Active agent policy raised to 15 to match the director instruction for live SpringMSA and Development groups.

Task state flow is fixed as assigned -> acknowledged -> doing -> heartbeat* -> reported -> completed|blocked|stopped. PTY-visible ACK/HEARTBEAT/REPORT remains source of truth. Work Ledger event kind is controlled vocabulary; unknown event kinds are rejected by API after the next approved 9002 maintenance restart. Policy document: docs/agent-state-management-policy-20260531.md.
